latestValidationChecks.criterion: 서버 WebSocket 메시지 수신 → 캐릭터 위치/HP 실시간 업데이트
latestValidationChecks.evidence: GameState._on_message handles 'turn_result', emits characters_updated. Character.update_from_data() reads hp/x/y, animates via Tween, redraws HP bar. WebSocketClient auto-reconnects every 5 s.

latestValidationChecks.criterion: 캐릭터 클릭 → 성좌 채팅 패널 슬라이드인 + 'X 성좌가 입장하였습니다' 알림
latestValidationChecks.evidence: Character emits character_clicked via Area2D. Main._on_character_clicked() calls OraclePanel.show_for_character() → _slide_in() tween + notification toast.

latestValidationChecks.criterion: 신탁 버튼: 포인트 충분 시 활성, 부족 시 비활성화
latestValidationChecks.evidence: OraclePanel._refresh_button() gates oracle_btn.disabled on GameState.can_use_oracle() (points >= 5 AND cooldown <= 0). Button label changes to '포인트 부족' when insufficient.

latestValidationChecks.criterion: vercel deploy → 브라우저에서 정상 실행 (Web Export .wasm)
latestValidationChecks.evidence: .github/workflows/client-web-export.yml, client/build.sh, vercel.json (COEP/COOP headers), and export_presets.cfg are all present and syntactically correct. No Godot binary available in runner; actual .wasm artifact and live Vercel URL require an external CI run to confirm.

validationChecks.criterion: 서버 WebSocket 메시지 수신 → 캐릭터 위치/HP 실시간 업데이트
validationChecks.evidence: GameState._on_message handles 'turn_result' (line 45-52): emits characters_updated with full characters array. Character.update_from_data() (line 65) reads hp/x/y, animates position via Tween, redraws HP bar. WebSocketClient reconnects automatically every 5 s and pings every 30 s.

validationChecks.criterion: 캐릭터 클릭 → 성좌 채팅 패널 슬라이드인 + 'X 성좌가 입장하였습니다' 알림
validationChecks.evidence: Character emits character_clicked signal on Area2D mouse click. Main._on_character_clicked() (line 115) calls OraclePanel.show_for_character() which triggers _slide_in() cubic-ease tween, then shows notification 'X 성좌가 입장하였습니다' (line 120).

validationChecks.criterion: 신탁 버튼: 포인트 충분 시 활성, 부족 시 비활성화
validationChecks.evidence: OraclePanel._refresh_button() (line 58-71): oracle_btn.disabled = not GameState.can_use_oracle(). can_use_oracle() returns true only if oracle_points >= 5 AND cooldown <= 0. Button text changes to '포인트 부족' when points < ORACLE_COST. Cooldown label shows remaining seconds.

validationChecks.criterion: vercel deploy → 브라우저에서 정상 실행 (Web Export .wasm)
validationChecks.evidence: client/vercel.json sets outputDirectory:'build/web', Content-Type:application/wasm for .wasm files, and COEP/COOP headers required by Godot Web Export for SharedArrayBuffer. export_presets.cfg exports to build/web/index.html. Actual .wasm binary requires running 'godot --export-release "Web" build/web/index.html' in CI; binary not present in repo (expected — Godot editor must be installed).
